title: cyperus cephalanthus
intro: Cyperus cephalanthus, also known as yellow papyrus or umbrella papyrus, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus cephalanthus include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
